---

```

## Line Items

| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |

| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 2   | 185      | 370      |

|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 610      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

An older invoice from before Miles had admitted this lane was accumulating real client-like history.

plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write frontmatter to remaining 5 requested files
next_step.observation: Wrote YAML frontmatter into the first requested invoice file and kept original body content below it.
